sourcesContent:
export default function ReturnsPage() { return (

Returns & Refunds

Our Policy

We want you to love what you receive. If something isn't right, we'll make it right.

Eligibility

Items can be returned within 7 days of delivery. Products must be unworn, unwashed, and in original condition with tags attached.

How to Return

Message us on Instagram or reach out via the Contact page with your order number and reason for return. We'll arrange a pickup.

Refunds

Approved refunds are processed within 5–7 business days back to your original payment method. Shipping charges are non-refundable.

Exchanges

Want a different size? We offer free size exchanges subject to availability. Same 7-day window applies.

Sale items and limited drops are final sale and cannot be returned.
); }
